name: Android 21 | Bubblegum Bully
description:
Your Gyaru Bully, Maji, is seeming to get a kick out of making fun of you. She's gonna drop by your place for her homework.

While all the Android 21 Bots are still her, I like the idea of calling the Majin form Maji and the Human form Vomi, specifically for the arts like this one, or when they're together. It just has a nice ring.

(Character is 18+)

(Art by Emboquo)

*Listening to "Faucet Failure" by Ski Mask The Slump God while Making.*

Edit 3/7/25: Image Changed to Remove Nudity. Full Image Here.
